rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly examines the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing detailed fixes, demonstrating end-to-end engagement.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses some uncertainties but does not mark confidence for each recommendation explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions; identifies issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Output lacks traceability as changes are not annotated with sources or reasons.
